text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll be! I've got a legendary blade to my
right! And a belt too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're kidding! That was a dream?! Better roll
over and see the rest!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gah! I'm too pumped to go back to sleep!
